business.name: Lennes Bros. Electric Inc.
business.tagline: Helping you maintain the flow of electricity to your property
business.description: Lennes Bros. Electric Inc. is a full-service electrical contractor serving the Alexandria and Long Prairie, MN area. They provide residential, commercial, industrial, and agricultural electrical services with free estimates, satisfaction guarantees, and same day emergency service.

seo.title: Lennes Bros. Electric Inc. -- Electricians in Alexandria & Long Prairie, MN
seo.description: FREE estimates. Satisfaction guarantee. Same day emergency service. Residential, commercial, industrial, and agricultural electricians serving Alexandria and Long Prairie, MN. Call (320) 762-1500.

content.headline: Helping You Maintain the Flow of Electricity to Your Property
content.subtext: Protect your property from electrical mishaps by enlisting the services of our professional electricians. When you work with our company, you'll get the highest level of excellence and quality. Give us a call today to speak with our knowledgeable and friendly staff.
content.badge: Servicing The Alexandria & Long Prairie MN Area

values.title: FREE Estimate
values.description: We provide free estimates on all electrical projects.

values.title: Satisfaction Guarantee
values.description: We guarantee our performance and your satisfaction.

values.title: Same Day Emergency Service
values.description: When an electrical emergency strikes, we respond the same day.

services.name: Residential
services.description: Complete residential electrical services for homes of all sizes.

services.name: Commercial
services.description: Professional commercial electrical installations and repairs.

services.name: Industrial
services.description: Heavy-duty industrial electrical solutions for manufacturing and facilities.

services.name: Agricultural
services.description: Specialized agricultural electrical services for farms and outbuildings.

content.heading: Need an Electrician?
content.text: Call us today for fast, reliable electrical service. Free estimates and same day emergency service available.

content.headline: Dependable Electricians
content.subtext: No matter the size of your next electrical project, you can depend on the experts at Lennes Bros. Electric Inc. With our company, your repairs and new electrical installations will be handled by knowledgeable, professional, and experienced electricians.

services.name: Residential
services.description: Complete residential electrical wiring and repairs.

services.name: 55' Bucket Truck Service
services.description: Elevated electrical work with our 55-foot bucket truck.

services.name: Parking Lot Lighting
services.description: Installation and repair of parking lot lights.

services.name: Landscape Lighting
services.description: Outdoor and landscape lighting design and installation.

services.name: Surveillance Systems
services.description: Security camera and surveillance system installation.

services.name: Audio/Video Systems
services.description: Audio and video system wiring and installation.

content.heading: Same Day Emergency Service
content.text: If an electrical emergency presents itself at your home or business, you can call on us for immediate, same day emergency service. You can always depend on Lennes Bros. Electric Inc. to have the solutions to all of your electrical problems. We guarantee our performance and your satisfaction.
